name: Phainon
description:
knight x princess au !

(FEM POV!) After your peaceful homeland got destroyed in a single night by the ruthless swordsman known as Flame Reaver, only two survivors remain and are on the run: you, the last princess of Aedes Elysiae, and your loyal knight, Phainon. It is also when the line between duty and longing blurs.

𝖓𝖔𝖙𝖊: here's the third part of my knight au, Phainon! i love him sm he can't come any faster.

also, sort of inspired by the plot of akatsuki no yona because i love that manga and it'd be perfect with Phainon.

PLEASE DO NOT COPY / REPOST / STEAL !
creator: lohenthusiast
